data.title: Analysis of 20M leads shows AI search impact on customer discovery journey; AI-driven discovery now quantifiable.
data.description: A recent study conducted by CallRail has revealed the significant impact of large language models (LLMs) on the customer buyer's journey. This analysis, released on January 27, 2026, demonstrates how AI-driven customer discovery has progressed from mere predictions to tangible outcomes. The study showcases the transformation in the customer journey, highlighting the increasing influence of LLMs on consumer behavior. This groundbreaking research provides valuable insights into the evolving landscape of customer interactions, indicating a measurable shift in buyer preferences.

data.title: Boeing's Q4 2025 revenue hits $23.9B with 160 commercial deliveries, earnings at $9.6B. Acquired Spirit AeroSystems, focuses on safety and quality.
data.description: In January 27, 2026, in Arlington, a significant development took place as a key acquisition of Spirit AeroSystems was finalized in December during the fourth quarter of 2025. This move highlights a strong dedication to maintaining safety, quality, and production stability within the industry. The revenue saw a notable rise, reaching $23.9 billion, mainly attributed to the successful completion of 160 commercial deliveries. Furthermore, the earnings showcased a substantial increase, reaching $9.6 billion during this period.

data.title: AeroVironment, Inc. (AV) to attend TD Cowen’s Aerospace & Defense Conference in Arlington with executives participating in a fireside chat on February 11, 2026, at 8:30am ET. | 7:30am CT | 5:30am PT.
data.description: Arlington-based company AeroVironment, Inc. (NASDAQ: AVAV) is set to participate in the TD Cowen Annual Aerospace & Defense Conference in Arlington, Virginia. During the conference on February 11, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET | 7:30 a.m. CT | 5:30 a.m. PT, key executives Jeffrey Rodrian and Denise Pacioni will engage in a fireside chat. Rodrian serves as the executive vice president and MacCready Works Group General Manager at AV, while Pacioni is the Head of Investor Relations. The fireside chat will be accessible via webcast at the specified times.

data.title: Houston Properties Team, led by Paige and Bob Martin, with 17 agents and $2 billion in lifetime sales, joins The Real Brokerage.
data.description: In Miami, the well-regarded Houston Properties Team, overseen by Paige and Bob Martin, has joined Real, bringing with them a total of 17 agents and an impressive $2 billion in lifetime sales.

data.title: Phemex launches Elite Trader Recruitment Program to support professional copy traders. Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: In Api, Samoa on January 27, 2026, Phemex, a crypto exchange prioritizing user experience, has unveiled the Elite Trader Recruitment Program. This initiative targets professional traders utilizing copy trading to share their strategies with a wider audience. The program aims to provide support and opportunities to traders.

data.title: NextEra Energy releases Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results on its website. Jan. 27, 2026. NYSE: NEE. Visit NextEraEnergy.com/FinancialResults.
data.description: In Juno Beach, Florida, on January 27, 2026, NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NEE) released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The details are accessible on the company's website at www.NextEraEnergy.com/FinancialResults. Senior management personnel from NextEra Energy were involved in the announcement.

data.title: TG Therapeutics will present data on BRIUMVI® for MS at ACTRIMS annual forum in San Diego from Feb 5-7, 2026. Abstracts available at www.forum.actrims.org.
data.description: TG Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: TGTX) has revealed that presentations featuring BRIUMVI ® (ublituximab-xiiy) will be showcased at the Americas Committee for Treatment and Research in Multiple Sclerosis (ACTRIMS) annual forum from February 5 to 7, 2026 in San Diego, California. The abstracts for these presentations are currently accessible on the ACTRIMS meeting website at www.forum.actrims.org. Stay updated for more information on the scheduled presentations.

data.title: W. P. Carey Inc. discloses tax treatment of 2025 dividends on Form 1099-DIV for stockholders; consult tax advisors.
data.description: W. P. Carey Inc., traded as WPC on NYSE, has disclosed the income tax implications for dividends listed on Form 1099-DIV in 2025. Shareholders are advised to seek guidance from their individual tax advisors regarding the tax treatment for W. P. Carey dividends.

data.description: In Singapore on January 27, 2026, BTC Digital Ltd. (NASDAQ: BTCT), a prominent blockchain technology firm, revealed a significant collaboration with Fog Computing Inc. The partnership involves a strategic framework cooperation agreement to set up a...

data.title: insured.io partners with Gulf States Insurance Group for customer experience platform, aiding digital transformation.
data.description: In Sacramento, California on January 27, 2026, insured.io revealed that Gulf States Insurance Group has selected their cloud-based customer engagement platform for their digital transformation. Gulf States will utilize the platform to enhance their insurance services.
Helix Acquisition Corp. III completes $172.5M IPO, with underwriters exercising option to purchase additional shares.

data.title: BriaCell reports extended >18-47 months survival in Phase 2 metastatic breast cancer patients, with 9 cases surpassing 18 months.
data.description: Philadelphia and Vancouver, BC - On January 27, 2026, BriaCell Therapeutics Corp revealed encouraging Phase 2 survival data for their immunotherapies. The clinical-stage biotechnology company reported that several patients with metastatic breast cancer have exceeded the typical survival expectations, with 9 individuals surpassing the 18-month milestone in their latest evaluations. BriaCell's stock is listed under Nasdaq as BCTX, BCTXW, BCTXZ, BCTXL, and under TSX as BCT.

data.title: Volatus and Dufour Aerospace partner to develop runway-independent cargo capabilities for Arctic, defense, and commercial ops.
data.description: Volatus is making strides in their collaboration with Dufour Aerospace to create cargo capabilities that won't rely on runways, specifically for Arctic, defense, and commercial purposes. This partnership aims to enhance operations in challenging environments by developing advanced technology for transporting goods. Key features include the ability to overcome runway limitations and operate efficiently in various terrains. The strategic alliance is set to revolutionize cargo transportation with a focus on versatility and effectiveness. Stay updated for further developments on this innovative project.

data.title: Karman Space & Defense in California wins MDA contract as part of SHIELD IDIQ worth $151 billion. #DefenseContracting
data.description: Based in Huntington Beach, California, Karman Space & Defense (NYSE: KRMN) has recently secured a contract from the Missile Defense Agency for the Scalable Homeland Innovative Enterprise Layered Defense. The company, known for its swift creation, advancement, and manufacturing of vital next-gen systems in line with the U.S. Department of War's key objectives, addresses the rising need for space access. This contract marks a significant milestone for Karman, demonstrating their commitment to enhancing national defense capabilities.

data.title: Maximus launches Accuracy Assistant for SNAP program, using AI to detect data errors in state government programs.
data.description: Maximus, a prominent government services provider, unveiled Accuracy Assistant™, a new product designed for state government programs like SNAP, aiming to enhance accuracy. Through predictive analytics and intelligent automation, the solution identifies data inconsistencies and highlights accuracy problems in real-time case file analysis. The AI-powered suite offers tailored offerings for SNAP, enabling state authorities to promptly address potential discrepancies. Maximus, traded on NYSE under MMS, anticipates this innovation will significantly improve program efficiency and efficacy.

data.title: AV and CAL Analytics launch BVLOS airspace management facility with U.S. Air Force and Ohio DOT partnership at NAAMCE.
data.description: In Springfield, Ohio, AeroVironment, Inc. (AV) and CAL Analytics have unveiled a new Beyond Visual Line of Sight (BVLOS) airspace management facility at the National Advanced Air Mobility Center of Excellence (NAAMCE) located at Springfield-Beckley Municipal Airport. AV, known for its software-enabled autonomous systems, and CAL Analytics, specializing in advanced airspace management, successfully completed the installation, marking a significant milestone. AV is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol AVAV, and this collaboration underscores their commitment to advancing defense technology. The facility aims to enhance operational efficiencies and safety in autonomous aerial systems.
